sn55.44:1.1: "Bhikkhus, a noble disciple who possesses four things is said to be rich, with much wealth and property.
sn55.44:1.2: What four? "Here, bhikkhus, a noble disciple possesses confirmed confidence in the Buddha … in the Dhamma … in the Saṅgha. … He possesses the virtues dear to the noble ones, unbroken … leading to concentration.
sn55.44:1.3: "A noble disciple who possesses these four things is said to be rich, with much wealth and property."
